payload.label: bottle
payload.short_description: white plastic bottle with blue label
payload.long_description: Tall white plastic personal-care bottle with a blue rectangular label on the mid-to-lower body and smaller dark printed logo/text near the shoulder; upright, slightly blurred and low-resolution, mostly visible but with a minor top-edge crop, photographed at close range (approximately 0.6 m).
